CustomField.description: Semicolon-separated list of Opportunity Record Type names to exclude from GAU Allocation rollup calculations. Opportunities with these Record Types will not have their Allocations included in the GAU rollup totals. Leave blank to include all Record Types in allocation rollups.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Opportunity Record Types to exclude from GAU Allocation rollups. Enter names separated by semicolons.
CustomField.label: Excluded Opp RecTypes
